name: Cryptocurrency Mining Process
notes: This rule triggers when a cryptocurrency mining process is detected. This could indicate a machine infected by a malware or a misuse of a corporate asset.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Name Patterns
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Name Patterns, BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names
TD_list: APPLY Cryptocurrency Mining Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Name Patterns, BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names
RED_list: Event description: A cryptocurrency mining process has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
